name: AgentShield
description: AI Agent Security Framework — Prompt Injection Defense, Tool Call Guardrails, Real-time Audit

strictMode.description: Block all detected threats (true) or warn only (false)

allowedExecPatterns.description: Glob patterns for allowed exec commands

blockedDomains.description: Domains to block in browser/exec calls

dashboard.description: Enable the security dashboard HTTP route

rateLimit.description: Max tool calls per minute before rate anomaly warning/block

blockOutbound.description: Block outbound messages when injection or sensitive data is detected (default: warn only)
